chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr.B.A. No.S-1142 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on urgent application M.A. No.9671 /2022 2. For orders on office objection. 3. For orders on exemption application M.A. No.9672/2022 4. For hearing of main case 28.10.2022 Mr. Ghulam Nabi Jarwar advocate for applicants along with applicants. -.-.-. 1. Urgency granted. 2. Overruled. 3. Granted. 4. It is stated that applicantsare innocent but have been falsely implicated in this case out of enmity; that the applicants want to surrender before the trial court but need protection as they apprehend their arrest. Without touching the merits of the case, the applicantsare granted protective bail for 08 days from today subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- eachand PR Bond of the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. This order shall cease to have its effect on expiry of 08 days on 04.11.2022 or on surrender of the applicants before the concerned Court, whichever is earlier. Bail application stands disposed of. JUDGE Ali Haider
